title: Our Warming Planet
passage:
Our Planet is Getting Warmer

Earth is our home. Today, our planet is getting warmer. This warming is called global warming. It is a big problem for everyone. Why is this happening?

Humans use coal, oil, and gas to make energy. We use energy to drive cars, heat our homes, and run big factories. When we burn these things, they make greenhouse gases. These gases go up into the sky. They form a thick cover around the Earth. This cover traps the heat from the sun. This is why our world is getting hotter every year.

Global warming changes our weather. In many places, summers are now very hot and dry. In other places, there are heavy rains and big floods. The ice in very cold areas, like the Arctic, is melting fast. Because the ice melts, the sea level is rising. This is dangerous for cities near the ocean. Many animals are also in danger. For example, polar bears cannot find food easily because the sea ice is disappearing.

How can we help our planet? We can do many simple things every day. First, we can save energy. We can turn off the lights and TVs when we do not use them. Second, we can walk, ride bicycles, or take buses instead of driving private cars. Third, we can plant more trees in our gardens. Trees clean the air because they take in greenhouse gases. Fourth, we can recycle paper, plastic, and glass. Making new things uses a lot of energy, so recycling helps save energy.

We must protect our beautiful Earth. Every small action can help make our world a better and safer place for the future.

questions.text: What is the main problem of our planet mentioned in the text?
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Today, our planet is getting warmer. This warming is called global warming.'

questions.explanation: The text states: 'When we burn these things, they make greenhouse gases... They form a thick cover around the Earth.'

questions.text: Why is the sea level rising?
questions.explanation: The text states: 'The ice in very cold areas, like the Arctic, is melting fast. Because the ice melts, the sea level is rising.'

options.NOT GIVEN: If the information is not in the passage

options.NOT GIVEN: If the information is not in the passage

questions.explanation: The text states: 'so recycling helps save energy.'

vocabulary.meaning: the process of the Earth's temperature rising and getting hotter
gases that stay in the air and trap heat around the Earth
turning from solid ice into liquid water because of heat
to collect and treat rubbish (like paper or plastic) to produce useful materials again

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài Reading A1-A2

1. Tìm từ khóa giống hệt: Đối với trình độ này, các câu hỏi thường sử dụng từ vựng chính xác từ bài đọc. Hãy khoanh vùng các từ như 'buses', 'disappearing', 'sky' trong bài đọc để tìm ra đáp án nhanh chóng.

2. Chú ý giới hạn từ: Với dạng bài điền từ, luôn đọc kỹ yêu cầu số lượng từ (ví dụ: NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Đáp án phải được lấy trực tiếp từ văn bản, không tự ý thay đổi dạng của từ.

3. Phân biệt False và Not Given: Nếu thông tin trong câu hỏi ngược lại hoàn toàn với bài đọc, chọn FALSE. Nếu thông tin không được nhắc đến (ví dụ: sở thích của trẻ em), chọn NOT GIVEN.
